regimeSub: Soft US retail sales reinforce disinflationary narrative; BOK hike digested as KOSPI extends bounce.
themes: June retail sales miss (weaker than expected despite Prime Day/World Cup) → consumer momentum fading supports NY Fed Williams' 'inflation peaked' call, dampens July FOMC hike odds
BOK 25bp hike to 2.75% now priced → USDKRW grinds lower to 1477 (-0.5% from yesterday's 1485) as won strength persists post-Rhee hawkish pivot
TSMC raises capex and revenue guidance on AI chip demand → KOSPI +1% to 6820, SK Hynix HBM supply crisis narrative intact through 2027 per Tech Times
Renewed Hormuz hostilities per CNBC driving ECB rates rethink → Brent holds $85 as OPEC+ August quota hike collides with geopolitical premium, gold bid at $3988

signalNotes.name: US Real Rate
signalNotes.note: 10Y real ~1.05% (4.55 nominal - 3.5 CPI); positive real rates persist but soft data keeps Fed on hold through July

signalNotes.name: 2s10s Curve
signalNotes.note: Curve at +42bp (4.55-4.13); steepening reflects growth concerns as retail sales disappoint

signalNotes.name: HY Credit Spread
signalNotes.note: VIX at 16.73 implies complacency; credit spreads contained as soft landing narrative holds

signalNotes.name: VIX
signalNotes.note: 16.73 down from recent highs; SPX at 7533 (-0.5% from yesterday) as retail miss weighs

signalNotes.name: Brent Crude
signalNotes.note: $85.04 flat; OPEC+ quota hike offset by renewed Hormuz tensions per CNBC/IER reports

signalNotes.name: Gold
signalNotes.note: $3988 holding near highs; geopolitical bid from Hormuz plus real rate ceiling keeps floor

signalNotes.name: USD / KRW
signalNotes.note: 1477 vs 1485 yesterday; won strength on BOK hike + SK growth forecast raised to 3% on AI memory

signalNotes.name: Semiconductor SOX
signalNotes.note: TSMC capex/revenue raise signals sustained AI demand; SK Hynix supply crisis thesis intact through 2027

headline: Soft US retail sales and digested BOK hike reinforce disinflation thesis as renewed Hormuz hostilities keep ECB on edge and TSMC capex raise sustains AI semiconductor bid.
